<features>
- observable feature: grid pattern of square indentations
- observable feature: golden-brown color
- observable feature: syrup being poured onto surface
</features>
<kb>
- IF [grid pattern of square indentations AND golden-brown color] THEN [43]
- IF [grid pattern of square indentations AND pink color] THEN [43]
- IF [abstract brushstrokes AND multiple colors] THEN [34]
- IF [polka dot pattern AND fabric texture] THEN [10]
- IF [irregular surface texture AND natural material] THEN [4]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image has a grid pattern of square indentations and a golden-brown color, which matches the features for class 43.
</rule_check>

<response>43</response>
